Hardware Component File

BMS2_SED_SW610

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BMS2_SW610_v1.0_20150728T113909.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 796
Receive ID 7B6
Functional Addr A8
Functional Name LBC2

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AE0",
    "soft": "0610",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Associated Devices

Low voltage supply input ID:
Cell input lines ID:
Internal memory RAM/ROM ID:
External NV memory (EEPROM, FLASH) ID:
Safety CPU/Slave Communication ID:
Second ASIC (redundacy) ID:
CAN Engine (safety CPU) ID:
